coupons.title: Coupons
coupons.subtitle: Discount codes that buyers can apply at checkout.

dashboard.noOrdersYet: No orders yet — once customers buy your products, they'll show here.

revenueDashboard.title: Revenue split
revenueDashboard.subtitle: Web sales accumulate in your withdrawable balance. POS sales go to in-store revenue.
revenueDashboard.posLifetimeDesc: In-store earnings — kept in shop, not withdrawable.

ordersDashboard.title: Orders overview
ordersDashboard.subtitle: High-level snapshot of all your orders. Use Orders → tabs for action queues.

conversion.title: Conversion
conversion.subtitle: Funnel from product views → cart → checkout. Tracked from logged-in shoppers.
conversion.noteText: view→cart and view→order rates are computed from logged-in shoppers only (where we can match a session to an account). Anonymous viewers are counted in sessions but not in this funnel.

traffic.title: Traffic
traffic.subtitle: Where your visitors come from, what they browse, and which devices they use.
traffic.allDirectInternal: All traffic is direct or internal

ordersList.title: Orders
ordersList.filterAllDesc: Every order from your shop, regardless of status.
ordersList.filterPendingDesc: Approved orders ready to be packed and shipped. Payment has been verified.
ordersList.filterProcessingDesc: Orders that are paid and ready to be packed and shipped.
ordersList.filterShippingDesc: Orders currently in transit to the customer.
ordersList.filterCancelledDesc: Orders that were cancelled before delivery.
ordersList.filterReturnedDesc: Paid orders that were cancelled (proxy for refund until a dedicated Dispute model is added).
ordersList.cancelConfirm: Cancel this order? The buyer will be notified. This may need a manual refund if already paid.

addProduct.title: Add product
addProduct.posIntroBody: these are sold at your terminal by scanning a barcode. Revenue from POS sales goes to your shop directly and is
addProduct.whereToSellHint: Pick one — you can change it later from the product detail page
addProduct.storeOnlyDesc: Sold at the POS terminal only. Not visible on the web storefront.
addProduct.alsoOnWebDesc: Sold both at the POS terminal and on your public web storefront.
addProduct.productDetailsHint: Minimum info needed to ring up a sale at the terminal
addProduct.existingBarcodeHint: Scan or paste — we'll keep it as-is. Leave blank to auto-generate.
addProduct.imageSectionHint: At least one image (used as POS catalog cover)
addProduct.uploadHint: Upload up to {{max}} images. The first image is used as the cover.
addProduct.barcodePreviewHint: Save the product and the generated barcode appears here — ready to print on a sticker or download as SVG.
addProduct.printerInfo: The Print button activates only when a USB sticker printer is paired with this browser. Click Connect sticker printer once per session — the OS print dialog will offer the device when you press Print.
addProduct.errImage: At least one product image is required

productDetail.deleteConfirm:
Delete "{{name}}"?

This is permanent. Existing orders will keep a snapshot of the product.
productDetail.errWaitUploads: Wait for image uploads to finish before saving
productDetail.errImageRequired: At least one product image is required
productDetail.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the product. Materials, fit, sizing, key selling points…
productDetail.imagesHint: Up to 8. The first image is the cover.
productDetail.advertBannersHint: Up to 4 wide images shown on the storefront promo strip.
productDetail.showOnStorefrontDesc: Hide if you only want to sell at POS.
productDetail.freeShippingDesc: Adds a green badge on the storefront.

categoriesPage.title: My categories
categoriesPage.subtitle: Categories used across your catalog. The platform-wide list is managed by admin.

violations.title: Policy violations
violations.subtitle: Products flagged by admin for policy issues. Review and remediate, or appeal via Support.
violations.goodStanding: Your shop is in good standing.

refunds.title: Refunds
refunds.subtitle: Customer refund requests. Approving deducts the amount from your withdrawable balance.
refunds.approveDesc: The refund amount will be deducted from your withdrawable balance.
refunds.rejectDesc: The customer will be notified that this request was declined.
refunds.completeDesc: Mark this refund as transferred to the customer.
refunds.notePlaceholder: Optional note for the customer or internal record

settlements.title: Settlements
settlements.subtitle: Withdrawals grouped by period — see how much landed in your bank account each {{period}}.
settlements.noSettlementsDesc: Once you complete a withdrawal, it will appear grouped here.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Unified ledger — every income, withdrawal, fee, and refund touching your balance.

posTerminal.title: POS Terminal
posTerminal.subtitle: Scan a barcode or click a product. {{count}} POS items in catalog.
posTerminal.scannerLabel: Scanner input — barcode or manual entry
posTerminal.noPosProducts: No POS products yet — add one from /products/add
posTerminal.cartEmpty: Cart is empty — scan a barcode to start
posTerminal.posSaleNote: POS sale — paid in person at the terminal. Revenue routes to your shop balance (non-withdrawable).

posSales.title: POS sales history
posSales.subtitle: All in-store transactions rung up at the terminal. Revenue routes to your shop balance.
posSales.noSales: No POS sales in this range

posShifts.title: POS shifts
posShifts.subtitle: Daily shift summary derived from your POS sales — one row per business day.
posShifts.footnote: Shift = a contiguous business day. First and last sale times come from the actual POS transactions (not a manual clock-in/out).

registers.title: POS registers
registers.subtitle: One card per POS terminal that has rung up sales. Use the terminal page to ring up new ones — the register ID is recorded automatically per order.
registers.noRegistersDesc1: Ring up your first sale at the

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: Messages from buyers — they appear here in real time when buyers chat from your product pages.
inbox.buyerHint: Buyers can chat with you from any of your product pages.
inbox.selectConversationHint: Pick a buyer from the list to view the thread.

customersList.title: Customers
customersList.subtitle: Everyone who has ordered from your shop, with spend and engagement summary.
customersList.noCustomersHint: Customers appear here after their first order.

segments.title: Customer segments
segments.subtitle: Auto-segmented by purchase behavior. Use these as audiences for broadcasts and coupons.
segments.vipDesc: Top-spending customers — give them priority shipping and exclusive coupons.
segments.regularDesc: Repeat buyers who consistently come back.
segments.newDesc: Customers in their first 30 days — perfect time for a welcome promo.
segments.inactiveDesc: Haven't ordered in 90+ days — try a re-engagement broadcast.

labels.title: Customer labels
labels.subtitle: Tag customers manually and override the auto-segment for any individual.

customerActivity.title: Customer activity
customerActivity.subtitle: Profile, lifetime value, and order history with this customer.
customerActivity.viewMessagesDesc: Open inbox to see chat history with this customer.

campaignsList.title: Campaigns
campaignsList.subtitle: Unified view of every coupon, promotion, and broadcast you've set up.
campaignsList.noCampaignsHint: Start with a coupon, flash sale promotion, or broadcast announcement.

broadcast.title: Broadcasts
broadcast.subtitle: Mass-message your customers or followers via in-app or email.
broadcast.noBroadcastsHint: Send your first announcement to engage customers.
broadcast.sendConfirm: Send this broadcast now? This cannot be undone.
broadcast.messagePlaceholder: What do you want to tell them?
broadcast.draftHint: Saved as a draft — review and click Send now on the list to deliver.

promotions.title: Promotions
promotions.subtitle: Time-limited campaigns: flash sales, bundles, and BOGO deals.
promotions.noPromotionsHint: Launch a flash sale or bundle to boost sales.

creators.title: Affiliate creators
creators.subtitle: Creators who picked up your products to promote, with their commission and click stats.
creators.noCreators: No creators have picked up your products yet.

commission.title: Commission
commission.subtitle: Total commission paid to creators promoting your products. Each product can use a percent or fixed-amount commission.
commission.noProducts: No products have affiliate enabled. Go to a product → enable "Allow creators".

affCampaigns.title: Affiliate campaigns
affCampaigns.subtitle: Coordinated affiliate pushes (e.g. seasonal launches, exclusive coupons for creators).
affCampaigns.comingSoonDesc: The MarketingCampaign model has not been implemented yet. For now, manage individual product commissions from

performance.title: Affiliate performance
performance.subtitle: Conversion and revenue contribution from your affiliate program.

salesAnalytics.title: Sales analytics
salesAnalytics.subtitle: Revenue and order trend over time.

productsAnalytics.title: Product analytics
productsAnalytics.subtitle: Top sellers, slow movers, and inventory alerts derived from your paid orders.

customersAnalytics.title: Customer analytics
customersAnalytics.subtitle: Buyer behavior derived from your paid orders — repeat rate, average spend, top customers.

chatAnalytics.title: Chat analytics
chatAnalytics.subtitle: Response time, message volume, and chat-to-order conversion.

tickets.title: Support tickets
tickets.subtitle: Open a ticket to reach the LalaShop support team for any account, payment, or shop issue.
tickets.noTickets: No tickets yet — open one to ask for help.
tickets.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what happened, what you've tried, and what you need...
tickets.awaitingResponse: Awaiting a response from the support team.
tickets.footnote: Reply via the customer site or wait for an admin response — you'll be notified when the team replies.

appeals.title: Appeals
appeals.subtitle: Account or shop-policy issues you've escalated to LalaShop.
appeals.info: Appeals open a support ticket with category
appeals.infoEnd: Use the regular Tickets page to file one.

supportReports.title: Reports about my shop
supportReports.subtitle: Reports filed by buyers against your shop or products. Admin reviews and decides.
supportReports.noReports: No reports filed against your shop. Keep it up!
supportReports.footerStart: If you believe a report is incorrect, file an

storeSettings.title: Store settings
storeSettings.subtitle: Public-facing identifiers and copy for your storefront.
storeSettings.brandIdentityHint: Logo, banner, and how customers find your store.
storeSettings.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell shoppers what makes your shop unique.
storeSettings.localizationHint: Default language and currency for new customers.

shippingSettings.title: Shipping settings
shippingSettings.subtitle: Default rates, free-shipping rules, and per-region zones.
shippingSettings.defaultsHint: Used when a product doesn't override shipping.
shippingSettings.enableShippingDesc: Disable to mark all products as digital / pickup-only.
shippingSettings.freeShipDefaultDesc: Override per-product. New products inherit this setting.
shippingSettings.shippingZonesHint: Override defaults per region. Buyers in matching countries get the zone rate.
shippingSettings.noZones: No zones yet — defaults apply to all destinations.

paymentSettings.title: Payment settings
paymentSettings.subtitle: Choose what payment methods buyers can use and configure tax/payout rules.
paymentSettings.codDesc: Buyer pays the courier on receipt.
paymentSettings.bankTransferDesc: Buyer transfers to your registered bank account before delivery.
paymentSettings.promptPayDesc: Thai instant payment via QR code.
paymentSettings.vatHint: If you're VAT-registered, declare it here.
paymentSettings.vatRegisteredDesc: Charge VAT on web sales and include it on invoices.
paymentSettings.payoutScheduleHint: How often verified earnings are settled to your bank.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect external platforms to sync products, orders, and messages.
integrations.footnote: These integrations store the account identifier for now. Full OAuth handshakes (TikTok Login, FB Login, etc.) are planned for a future release.
integrations.tiktokDesc: Sync products to TikTok Shop and import orders.
integrations.facebookDesc: Mirror your catalog to a Facebook Page shop.
integrations.instagramDesc: Tag products in Instagram posts and reels.
integrations.lineDesc: Get DMs from LINE customers in your inbox.
integrations.shopifyDesc: Two-way sync with an existing Shopify store.

login.tagline: Manage your products, fulfill orders, track revenue, and grow your shop — all in one place.
login.approvedOnly: Approved sellers only · Submit KYC from your customer profile if not yet approved
login.signInSubtitle: Use the email and password from your customer account
login.forgotHint: Forgot password? Use customer site to reset.
login.openShopHint: Submit KYC from your customer profile and wait for admin approval.
login.errEmailPassword: Please enter your email and password
login.errNotSeller: This account is not registered as a seller yet. Submit your KYC application first and wait for approval.

webProductForm.generalHint: Basic info shown on the product page and search results.
webProductForm.title: Title
webProductForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the product. Include materials, fit, sizing, and unique selling points.
webProductForm.mediaHint: Upload up to 8 photos. The first image is used as the cover.
webProductForm.advertImagesHint: Up to 4 banner-style images shown on the home page promo strip.
webProductForm.continueOversell: Continue selling when out of stock
webProductForm.wholesaleHint: Set MOQ and tier pricing for B2B buyers.
webProductForm.tierPricingHint: Set bulk-buy thresholds. The tier price (or % discount off the base price) is shown to buyers as a strike-through deal on the product page.
webProductForm.specificationsHint: Key/value pairs (e.g. Material → 100% cotton). Shown on the Specifications tab of your product page.
webProductForm.label: Label
webProductForm.noVariantsNeeded: This category does not require variants. You can still add custom options if needed.
webProductForm.tapSuggestions: Tap suggestions or type your own.
webProductForm.categoryDetailsHint: These descriptors appear on the product page so buyers know exactly what they're getting.
webProductForm.creatorAffiliateHint: Let approved creators promote this product and earn commission on each verified sale.
webProductForm.allowCreators: Allow creators to promote this product
webProductForm.allowCreatorsDesc: Creators add this product to their feed and you only pay commission on verified sales.
webProductForm.offerFreeShippingDesc: A green "Free shipping" badge will appear on the product page.
webProductForm.leadTimeHint: How long after payment until you ship. Shown as 'Lead Time' on the product page.
webProductForm.returnsHint: Return window shown on the product page. Disable if you don't accept returns.
webProductForm.acceptReturnsDesc: Buyers can request a return within the window below.
webProductForm.returnConditionsPlaceholder: e.g. Item must be unopened and in original packaging.
webProductForm.seoTitleHint: How this product appears in Google and social shares.
webProductForm.metaDescPlaceholder: Short summary that appears on search results.
webProductForm.categoryFooter: Switching the category resets the variant template below.
webProductForm.needHelpDesc: Read our seller guide on writing titles, pricing for wholesale, and choosing the right variants.
webProductForm.productSavedDesc: Your product is now in your store as {{status}}.
webProductForm.errImageRequired: Add at least one product image.
